stories: Good morning Sean, it's Tuesday, the fifth of May, 2026
Today is Cinco de Mayo - the day Mexico's underdog army pulled off one of history's great upsets against Napoleon's French forces at Puebla in 1862
The twist this year: Cinco de Mayo falls on a Tuesday, making it officially Taco Tuesday
Somewhere, a marketing team is very pleased
Six-thirty opens with a Voice of Customer presentation on Teams, then Potash and GBS connect at eight
The Weekly Integrations PwC meeting is at nine on Teams, followed by a Connect call at nine-thirty
Ten brings the L3 MOP, and ten-thirty the FBP Support Model Review
Block eleven for GBSLT Quarterly pre-work

Good evening Sean, it's Monday evening, the fourth of May, 2026
President has ever died in the month of May
Every other month has claimed at least one
May is also the only month you can't abbreviate
Before we get into the news Ã¢ÂÂ a heads up on tomorrow
You've got a full Tuesday: Morning Gym at the Club at seven-thirty, the Weekly Integrations PwC meeting at nine, then catch-ups with Paula at two and Nanda at three, both on Teams
And if you're still standing at eleven, the Safe Start mining safety call rounds out the day from Canada
In Singapore today, two moves worth noting
